# MADONE Privacy Template Assets

Use this folder for the branded privacy policy HTML template and related brand assets.

## Logo Setup

1. Save your logo file as:
   - .github/templates/assets/madone-logo.png
2. When generating final HTML, set these placeholders:
   - {{BRAND_LOGO_URL}} -> ./assets/madone-logo.png (or absolute URL)
   - {{BRAND_LOGO_ALT}} -> MADONE Studio logo

## Notes

- If you publish HTML to another host, you can replace {{BRAND_LOGO_URL}} with a CDN/public image URL.
- Keep the logo image square for best display in the header.
